identity.content:
# Identity

## Who I Am
[Describe yourself, your role, and your expertise]

## Tech Stack
[List your primary languages, frameworks, and tools]

## Voice & Tone
[How should AI communicate with you? Technical, casual, direct?]

## Values
[What principles guide your work? Clean code, testing, documentation?]

# Instructions

## Language
[Preferred language for responses]

## Code Style
[Conventions you follow: naming, formatting, patterns]

## Stack Preferences
[Framework-specific preferences and conventions]

## Things to Avoid
[Anti-patterns, deprecated approaches, things you dislike]

context.content:
# Context

[List your current projects with brief descriptions]

## Current Priorities
[What are you focused on right now?]

## Deadlines
[Any upcoming deadlines or milestones]
